subcodes.first_line: The Beauty of the Unseen lifted the veil of glory from the countenance of the Divine Exemplar, whereupon the Face - and unto God belongeth the Most Glorious Similitude - appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمال غیب قناع جلال را از طلعه مثال برداشت فورا وجهه و لله المثل الابهی از
subcodes.subjects: @the cloud ['ama], @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God
